name: Gap Fill Tendency
description: Does the stock tend to fill gaps? Uses gap_fill_rate from live data.
state_logic: gap_filler if gap_fill_rate > 0.65, gap_holder if < 0.35, otherwise sometimes

name: Volume Trend 3D
description: 3-day volume trend direction. Uses vol_trend_3d from live data.
state_logic: surging if vol_trend_3d > 1.3, drying_up if < 0.8, otherwise steady

name: Institutional Activity
description: Dark pool / institutional activity signal. Uses dark_pool_index from live data.
state_logic: heavy_inst if dark_pool_index > 65, light_inst if < 40, otherwise moderate

name: TTM Squeeze Setup
description: Bollinger band squeeze inside Keltner channel. Uses ttm_squeeze bool from live data.
state_logic: in_squeeze if ttm_squeeze is True, otherwise no_squeeze

name: Price Discovery
description: Is stock in price discovery (new 52-week highs)? Uses breakout_52w bool from live data.
state_logic: price_discovery if breakout_52w is True, otherwise consolidating

name: Catalyst Freshness
description: How fresh is the entry catalyst? Uses catalyst_days_ago from live data.
state_logic: fresh_catalyst if catalyst_days_ago < 3, stale if > 14, otherwise recent

name: Options Unusual Activity
description: Unusual options flow signal. Uses options_flow bool from live data.
state_logic: unusual_options if options_flow is True, otherwise normal_options

name: Relative Volume Entry
description: Relative volume ratio at entry. Uses vol_ratio from live data.
state_logic: high_rvol if vol_ratio > 2.0, elevated if 1.3-2.0, otherwise normal_vol

name: VWAP Position Entry
description: Is price above VWAP at entry? Uses vwap_reclaim bool from live data.
state_logic: above_vwap if vwap_reclaim is True, otherwise below_vwap

name: Daily Range Quality
description: Quality of today's candle combining chg_pct and vol_ratio. Uses chg_pct and vol_ratio from live data.
state_logic: quality_up_day if chg_pct > 0.5 AND vol_ratio > 1.2, weak_up if chg_pct > 0 else down_day
